name: localfirsttools
description: Discover and open any LocalFirst Tool. 2887 single-file, offline-first browser tools.

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search LocalFirst Tools by keyword/category. Returns matching tools with live URLs.

tools.name: open_tool
tools.description: Get the live URL + metadata for a tool by id or title.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all tool categories with counts.
